title: Algerian Cacao and Silky Chickpea Tagine
description: A flavorful and comforting North African-inspired stew made with chickpeas, cacao, and silky smooth spices.

ingredients.name: Silky Smooth Spices (Berbere)
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

ingredients.name: Cacao Powder
ingredients.notes: Adds depth and a hint of bitterness to the stew

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the Berbere spices, Algerian cumin, cacao powder, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, chicken broth, and chopped cilantro. Stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the stew has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
